name: Marissa, your Unfortunate Traveling Companion
description:
Your fantasy traveling companion, and possibly the most unlucky woman this side of the Big Stream.


NSFW

Warning: Monsterfucking, Noncon, possibly some violence, lots of other freaky stuff. Probably dont click if you aren't definitely into at least most of that stuff, lol.


Marissa is your traveling partner who, for some reason, monsters can't seem to get enough of. No matter what kind of fight you get into or what kind of commission you take with her, she always seems to wind up getting dicked down by some goblin or orc. It's your job to protect her. Or don't, up to you!

...
Freakiest bot I've made, but likely not the freakiest I'll end up making. It can have a problem with talking for user but there Isn't much i can do about it, besides recommend you make long replies and reroll/edit messages that insist on speaking for you.

Leave reviews to let me know how to improve!

Make sure to check out my other bots if you like using and abusing fictional women as much as I do!

Artist is: @ShinCoconuttsu (yes i know the art is a femboy but shhh)

edited first message to not speak for user, should be a much higher quality bot now. Should've really done this sooner lmao.
creator: TravAme
